M0680_PR_TOILETING (M0680) Prior Toileting Prior ability to get to and from toilet or bedside commode. 00 = Able to get to and from the toilet independently with our without a device
01 = When reminded, assisted, or supervised by another person, able to get to and from the toilet
02 = Unable to get to and from the toilet but is able to use a bedside commode (with our without assistance)
03 = Unable to get to and from the toilet or bedside commode but is able to use a
